title: Reliquified L_Ender 's Cataclysm
description: Compatibility addon between Relics & L_Ender 's Cataclysm
body:
![Title](https://i.imgur.com/MsgrY7H.png)

Reliquified L_Ender's Cataclysm is an addon that bridges the Relics and L_Ender's Cataclysm mods, bringing a host of powerful relics themed around the fearsome bosses and mechanics of L_Ender's Cataclysm. Each relic captures the essence of its origin, granting players unique abilities inspired by their battles and enriching late-game progression with rewarding new challenges.

![Art](https://i.imgur.com/TgsjGyN.png)
